scripts.device: git fetch origin && git reset --hard origin/main && npx cap sync ios && grep -c pageInRight ios/App/App/public/app.js && npx cap open ios
scripts.uitest: npx cap sync ios && xcodebuild test -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' -configuration Debug
scripts.uitest:nobuild: xcodebuild test-without-building -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' -configuration Debug
